case_title: LORI ANN O''LEARY VS. IHOP ET AL

docket_entries.description: CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS TO ENTIRE ACTION BY COURT AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING FEB-25-2020 AT 10:30 AM. THIS DISMISSAL IS PURSUANT TO PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - NON-VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF O'LEARY, LORI ANN AS TO DEFENDANT IHOP DOES 1 TO 25 K AND J MANAGEMENT SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR DEC-04-2019 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  AUG-30-2019 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         NOV-12-2019
